description: Config for mapping normalized [0,1] stability metrics to letter grades, severity levels, and human-readable labels. Used by dashboards, Now CTA helpers, and flow recommendations.

letterGrades.label: Stable
letterGrades.description: Things are running smoothly. Maintain existing habits and occasionally review for improvement.

letterGrades.label: Mostly Stable
letterGrades.description: Generally stable with a few mild pressure points. A focused session now and then will keep things balanced.

letterGrades.label: Borderline
letterGrades.description: Noticeable friction. Aim a stabilization session here soon to prevent drift toward overwhelm.

letterGrades.label: Unstable
letterGrades.description: Household systems are under strain. Prioritize this domain for upcoming sessions or flows.

letterGrades.label: Critical
letterGrades.description: High stress or backlog. Recommend activating a dedicated stabilization flow or multi-session plan.

cooking.label: Meals & Cooking
cooking.notes: Cooking swings quickly with daily life; slight instability is normal so thresholds are a bit forgiving.

letterGrades.label: Meals Stable
letterGrades.description: Meals are predictable and mostly on-plan. Batch cooking and planning are working well.

letterGrades.label: Mostly Stable
letterGrades.description: Minor hiccups (last-minute meals or gaps), but overall you are feeding the household well.

letterGrades.label: Borderline
letterGrades.description: Frequent last-minute scrambling. A batch cooking or meal planning session will help.

letterGrades.label: Unstable
letterGrades.description: Families may be relying on convenience food or skipping meals. Strong candidate for food stabilization flows.

letterGrades.label: Critical
letterGrades.description: Feeding the household feels chaotic or unsafe. Recommend running a multi-step stabilization flow.

cleaning.label: Cleaning & Order
cleaning.notes: Visual clutter strongly impacts emotional stability; emphasize earlier warnings.

garden.label: Garden & Land
garden.notes: Garden stress is seasonal; instability is more tolerable outside active seasons.

letterGrades.label: Aligned
letterGrades.description: Beds, calendar, and maintenance are aligned. Garden work feels purposeful.

letterGrades.label: Mostly Aligned
letterGrades.description: Some weeds or backlog, but plans and harvests are mostly on track.

letterGrades.label: Lagging
letterGrades.description: Weeds, missed dates, or unlogged harvests. A maintenance or harvest-logging session will help.

letterGrades.label: Struggling
letterGrades.description: Garden feels more like guilt than joy. Recommend a short reset session and revisiting goals.

letterGrades.label: Abandoned
letterGrades.description: The garden may be largely unmaintained. Consider a season wrap-up or gentle restart flow.

storehouse.label: Storehouse & Inventory
storehouse.notes: Food, supplies, and reserves are foundational; low scores strongly impact overall stability.

animals.label: Animals & Livestock
animals.notes: Animal care has ethical and safety implications; emphasize warnings on low care metrics.

letterGrades.label: Well Cared For
letterGrades.description: Feed, water, shelter, and health routines are consistent.

letterGrades.label: Generally Cared For
letterGrades.description: Care is solid with minor lapses. A routine checkup session can tighten things up.

letterGrades.label: Inconsistent
letterGrades.description: Care routines are sometimes rushed or missed. Schedule a dedicated animal care session.

letterGrades.label: At Risk
letterGrades.description: Backlogs in cleaning, feed, or health checks. High priority for stabilization.

letterGrades.label: Critical
letterGrades.description: Animal welfare may be compromised. Strongly recommend immediate care sessions.

preservation.label: Preservation & Processing
preservation.notes: This domain buffers food stability; instability is heavily tied to season and harvest.

letterGrades.label: Preservation On Track
letterGrades.description: Backlog is low; upcoming harvests have matching preservation sessions scheduled.

letterGrades.label: Mostly On Track
letterGrades.description: Some items waiting, but risk of spoilage is low.

letterGrades.label: Backlogged
letterGrades.description: Noticeable queue of items to process. Recommend a focused preservation session.

letterGrades.label: Spoilage Risk
letterGrades.description: High risk of food going to waste. Strong candidate for a batch preservation session.

letterGrades.label: High Loss
letterGrades.description: Frequent spoilage or missed opportunities. Consider running a food stabilization flow.

tooltips.high: Your systems are working together. Keep building gentle habits.
tooltips.medium: Some domains are starting to strain. A small reset will help.
tooltips.low: Multiple domains feel heavy. Activate a stabilization flow or choose one key session to run.

mealCoverageRatio.label: Meal Coverage
mealCoverageRatio.description: How many planned meals are actually delivered per week.

lastMinuteMealsRatio.label: Last-Minute Meals
lastMinuteMealsRatio.description: Share of meals thrown together at the last minute.

batchSessionFreshness.label: Batch Sessions Freshness
batchSessionFreshness.description: How recently a supportive batch-cooking session was run.

zoneCoverageRatio.label: Zones Covered
zoneCoverageRatio.description: Portion of key zones cleaned within the desired interval.

clutterBacklogRatio.label: Clutter Backlog
clutterBacklogRatio.description: Share of zones flagged as cluttered or overdue.

bedsPreparedRatio.label: Beds Prepared
bedsPreparedRatio.description: How many planned beds are prepared for the current season.

missedTaskRatio.label: Missed Tasks
missedTaskRatio.description: Proportion of scheduled garden tasks that were missed.

criticalItemsCoverage.label: Critical Items Covered
criticalItemsCoverage.description: Coverage of key staple items compared to targets.

stockOutRisk.label: Stockout Risk
stockOutRisk.description: Risk-weighted chance of running out of important items soon.

careRoutineCompletion.label: Care Routines
careRoutineCompletion.description: Completion of daily and weekly animal care routines.

overdueHealthChecks.label: Overdue Health Checks
overdueHealthChecks.description: Ratio of overdue health or maintenance checks.

backlogRatio.label: Preservation Backlog
backlogRatio.description: Share of items waiting to be processed.

plannedSessionCoverage.label: Planned Sessions
plannedSessionCoverage.description: Coverage of preservation needs by scheduled sessions.
